{"id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.1","title":"Hardware: Bulk flash pipeline for R1 Neo","description":"Build a test jig and automation for flashing 500 R1 Neos.

## Requirements

- Flash rate: 50+ units/hour (10 hours total)
- Automated: plug in, flash, verify, next
- QA: verify LoRa TX/RX works before boxing

## Options

### Option 1: Multi-slot jig
- 10× pogo-pin beds on one board
- Single USB hub + script
- Flash 10 at a time

### Option 2: Assembly line
- 5 stations, 1 unit each
- Manual plug/unplug
- Script handles the rest

## Deliverables

- Jig hardware (PCB or 3D printed)
- Flash script (west flash + verify)
- QA test (TX/RX loopback or gateway ping)
- Packaging workflow","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:41:43.965129Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:41:43.965129Z","labels":["hardware","demo","milestone","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:41:44.130076Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value:
{"description":"Build a test jig and automation for flashing 500 T-Echos.

## Requirements

- Flash rate: 50+ units/hour (10 hours total)
- Automated: plug in, flash, verify, next
- QA: verify LoRa TX/RX + GPS lock before boxing

## T-Echo specifics

- nRF52840: flash via SWD or USB DFU
- UF2 bootloader may simplify (drag-drop flash)
- GPS test: wait for fix or inject fake NMEA
- E-ink test: display QR code with node ID

## Options

### Option 1: USB mass-flash
- T-Echo has UF2 bootloader
- Mount as USB drive, copy firmware
- Script: detect mount, copy, eject, beep
- 10 USB hubs × 5 ports = 50 at a time

### Option 2: SWD jig
- Pogo-pin bed for 10 units
- J-Link or CMSIS-DAP
- Faster but more hardware

## QA test sequence

1. Flash firmware
2. Boot, check USB serial output
3. LoRa TX test ping to gateway
4. GPS: wait for fix (or timeout OK if indoors)
5. E-ink: display node ID QR code
6. Pass → green LED, box it
7. Fail → red LED, set aside

## Deliverables

- Flash script (west flash or UF2 copy)
- QA test script
- Jig hardware (if SWD route)
- Packaging checklist"}
